testcase.name: EPIC-004: Onboarding Wizard E2E Tests › Should verify event system-activated listener is functional
testcase.system-out: 🔍 Test 1: Verifying system-activated event listener... ✅ system-activated event listener works correctly

testcase.name: EPIC-004: Onboarding Wizard E2E Tests › Should verify setup-step-completed listener is functional
testcase.system-out: 🔍 Test 2: Verifying setup-step-completed event listener... ✅ setup-step-completed event listener works correctly

testcase.name: EPIC-004: Onboarding Wizard E2E Tests › Should verify all CSS animations are defined
testcase.system-out: 🎬 Test 3: Verifying CSS animations... 📊 Animation Status: ✓ check-complete animation: true ✓ wizard-fade-in animation: true ✓ prefers-reduced-motion: true ✓ low-end-device detection: false

testcase.name: EPIC-004: Onboarding Wizard E2E Tests › Should verify hardwareConcurrency detection is active
testcase.system-out: 🖥️ Test 4: Verifying hardwareConcurrency detection... 💻 Hardware Detection: • CPU Cores: 8 • Is Low-End: false • low-end-device class applied: false

testcase.name: EPIC-004: Onboarding Wizard E2E Tests › Should verify AppointmentWizard events are registered
testcase.system-out: 🎫 Test 5: Verifying AppointmentWizard component... 📋 Component Status: ✓ Event system works: true ✓ setup-step-completed dispatch: true ℹ️ AppointmentWizard is lazy-loaded (verified via other tests)

testcase.name: EPIC-004: Onboarding Wizard E2E Tests › Should verify ActivationBanner is loaded
testcase.system-out: 🎊 Test 6: Verifying ActivationBanner component... 🎉 Banner Status: ✓ ActivationBanner component: false ✓ Portal target exists: true

testcase.name: EPIC-004: Onboarding Wizard E2E Tests › Should verify Setup completion events can be dispatched
testcase.system-out: 🔔 Test 7: Testing event dispatch simulation... 🎯 Setup Step Completions: ✅ services ✅ team ✅ hours ✅ profile ✅ booking ✅ appointment

testcase.name: EPIC-004: Onboarding Wizard E2E Tests › Should verify no console errors on page load
testcase.system-out: 🐛 Test 8: Checking for console errors... ✅ No console errors

testcase.name: EPIC-004: Onboarding Wizard E2E Tests › Should verify mobile responsiveness
testcase.system-out: 📱 Test 9: Checking mobile responsiveness... 📲 Mobile Optimization: ✓ Viewport meta: true ✓ Media queries: true
